vllm.title: [Bugfix] Properly set distributed_executor_backend in ParallelConfig
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
distributed_executor_backend in ParallelConfig was not set based on commandline flags.
@njhill @sahilsuneja1 thanks for #4539. I am seeing throughput improvements in preliminary benchmarks.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Re-enable custom roles in Chat Completions API
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support OpenAI batch file format
vllm.author: wuisawesome
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds basic support for the OpenAI batch file format (for chat endpoints).
The following help page summarizes the usage options:
# python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.run_batch --help
usage: run_batch.py [-h] -i INPUT_FILE -o OUTPUT_FILE [--response-role RESPONSE_ROLE] [--model MODEL] [--tokeni

vllm.title: [Core] Implement sharded state loader
vllm.author: aurickq
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR implements a new model loader that directly loads the sharded states of each worker when using DistributedGPUExecutor. When using tensor parallelism, this avoids each worker reading the full checkpoint just to load a small shard of it. Our tests using Arctic (#4652) showed a 10x improvement
